text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk into a local restaurant, I hear an
animated discussion coming from one of the
tables...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's all right, Tickezo! It was my fault!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Urghh... No... I don't wanna give up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You don't, like, have to prove yourself here!
Seriously!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On their table is something like a huge wall... But
on second glance, I realize it's a giant, half-eaten
hamburger.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer... This is... urp!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yikes! I'll explain—close that mouth!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So this place, they do these food challenges, right? I slightly encouraged her to try it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: As a joke though, you know? But Tickezo doesn't really do jokes, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Urgh... but... it sounded fun.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but like, that's why I suggested it. Totally
didn't think it'd be this huge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a point. The size of this burger is far
beyond what anyone would expect from a food
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Just give in. I even said we can eat it together—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll never give up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm only halfway through the race! This is where a
late surger like me shines!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can't... lose... Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
This isn't your kind of track! You'd need, like, an
Oguri-tier stomach to finish that thing!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you're her trainer! Don't just stand
there—you gotta tell her too!
choice_data_list: Get pumped up and finish it all!
Get pumped up and finish it all!
In times like these, you gotta use force!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you're her trainer! Don't just stand
there—you gotta tell her too!
choice_data_list: Get pumped up and finish it all!
Get pumped up and finish it all!
In times like these, you gotta use force!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YESSS! You're right, Trainer! I gotta get pumped!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, mind blown! Where'd all that energy come from?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: With my trainer's support, I know I can win this!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Already halfway to the finish! Here I gooo!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yikes! How's she actually speeding up this late in
the game?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The remaining half of the hamburger tower gets
smaller and smaller.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's insane... She can do all this just by getting
pumped?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You know, witnessing this is getting me hyped!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Go for it, Tickezo! You got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ticket continues to eat with incredible
momentum, until...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: One... more... bite!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAAH! I win! Victoryyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I did it... I finished it! I won against the giant
hamburger!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Tickezo! I'm super touched right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While crying tears of joy, the two give each other
a big hug.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I get it! That's, like, such a pro move!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Why're we squishing the burger now?
What's that gonna do?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know, like you see in movies and whatever.
Smash it down flat!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That way it'll get, like, way less bulky! It'll take
less bites to eat it all up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh, I get it! Trainer, you're a genius!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll smoosh it real good! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Jordan, let me climb on your back!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
This hamburger's too tall! I can't reach the top
from here! So you gotta lift me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, uh, no. Absolutely no way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After quite a lot of trial and error...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Urgh... M-managed to eat it all... by myself...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wooow, Tickezo, that was wild. I never thought
you'd actually finish it for reals.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That sauce was dripping everywhere, and the buns were about to pop out.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Still... I did it. And you know, I think I learned
something today.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You can overcome anything with power! YEAH!
WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you're a totally changed person now... You
good?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket doesn't seem to hear Tosen
Jordan as she basks in the joy of finishing her
giant burger.
